name: Block Unlimited Token Delegations
description: Prevents unlimited token approvals (u64::MAX) - most common drain attack

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: Unlimited token delegation (u64::MAX) - common drain attack pattern

name: Block Freeze + Approval Combo
description: Prevents freeze authority abuse combined with token approval

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: Freeze + Approval combination - attacker can freeze your approved tokens

name: Block Burn + Approval Combo
description: Prevents burn operations combined with approvals

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: Burn + Approval combination - your tokens could be destroyed

name: Block Net Delegation Increase
description: Blocks transactions that add more approvals than they revoke

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: Net increase in token delegations detected

name: Pass Revoke-Only Transactions
description: Explicitly allows revoke operations (security improvement)

rule.message: ✅ SAFE: Revoking token delegation (security improvement)

name: Alert on Token Burns
description: Warns when transaction will permanently destroy tokens

rule.message: ⚠️ WARNING: Token burn detected - your tokens will be permanently destroyed!

name: Alert on Freeze/Thaw Operations
description: Warns when freeze or thaw operations are detected

rule.message: ⚠️ WARNING: Account freeze/thaw operation - can prevent transfers

name: Alert on Token Minting
description: Warns when new tokens are being minted (supply inflation)

rule.message: ⚠️ WARNING: Token minting detected - supply will increase

name: Block Large SOL Transfers
description: Blocks native SOL transfers over 5 SOL

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: Large SOL transfer (> 5 SOL) - verify recipient address

name: Alert on SOL Transfers
description: Warns on SOL transfers over 0.1 SOL

rule.message: ⚠️ WARNING: Transferring SOL (> 0.1 SOL)

name: Block Account Creation Spam
description: Prevents creation of excessive accounts (rent drain attack)

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: Excessive account creation (> 20) - spam/rent drain attack

name: Alert on Multiple Account Creation
description: Warns when creating 3+ accounts (rent costs)

rule.message: ⚠️ WARNING: Creating 3+ accounts - will cost ~0.006+ SOL in rent

name: Block Complex Unknown Programs
description: Blocks complex transactions with multiple unknown programs

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: Complex transaction with 3+ unknown programs - potential obfuscation

name: Alert on High Complexity
description: Warns when complexity score exceeds threshold

rule.message: ⚠️ WARNING: Complex transaction detected - review carefully before signing

name: Alert on Potential Account Confusion
description: Warns on many writable non-signer accounts (missing signer check vulnerability)

rule.message: ⚠️ WARNING: Many writable accounts without signatures - potential missing signer check vulnerability

name: Block Dangerous Instruction Combinations
description: Blocks suspicious instruction combinations detected by analyzer

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: Dangerous instruction combination detected

name: Block Known Malicious Programs
description: Blocks transactions involving programs on blocklist

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: Transaction involves known malicious program

name: Block Critical Risk Transactions
description: Blocks transactions with risk score >= 90

rule.message: 🚨 BLOCKED: Critical risk score (>= 90) - multiple suspicious indicators

name: Alert on Authority Changes
description: Warns when transaction modifies token/account authority

rule.message: ⚠️ WARNING: Authority change detected - ownership will be modified

name: Block Drift-Style: Durable Nonce + Custom Program + Outflow
description: Blocks durable nonce transactions targeting a non-core custom program that also contain fund outflows in the same transaction. Low false positive rate - this combination is rare in legitimate use.

rule.message: BLOCKED: Durable nonce + custom program + fund outflow - Drift-style combined exploit pattern detected

name: Alert: Durable Nonce Targeting Custom Program
description: Alerts on any durable nonce transaction targeting a non-core custom program. Catches the Drift attack pre-signing step (admin takeover tx had no outflow). Will fire on legitimate multisig/governance workflows - operators should review and allowlist known-safe programs. Weight 60 contributes toward the blocking threshold.

rule.message: ALERT: Durable nonce transaction targeting non-core custom program - review for Drift-style pre-signed exploit (allowlist known-safe programs to suppress)
